headline: Visa Tests Stablecoin Spending While Shares Trade Below Valuation Estimates
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) is launching a stablecoin backed card program with Bridge, a Stripe company, aimed at bringing digital assets into everyday payments. The program supports spending stablecoins at Visa accepting merchants across more than 100 countries, with live deployment already active in 18 markets. Visa and Bridge are also running an on chain settlement pilot to use blockchain based rails for settling transactions and supporting stablecoin infrastructure. For a company that already sits at...
